response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior generalist with strong full-stack, DLang, and Node.js background, but lacks the deep Java/Kotlin/JVM and Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus expertise this role demands. Prior IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI was C/C++, not JVM tooling, and Java appears only as a peripheral skill rather than a core specialization.
strengths: Prior IDE/developer-tooling exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Experience with large-scale, performance-critical systems and complex codebases
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus experience
Java/Kotlin listed only as peripheral skills, not core expertise; no deep JVM internals work shown
Career focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang web and backend, not JVM language tooling

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin or substantial Java production experience
Prior IDE tooling and developer-experience work
